Package org.eventb.core.tests.sc

Interface IGenericSCTest<E extends IRodinElement,SCE extends IRodinElement>

All Superinterfaces:
IGenericElementTest<E>
All Known Implementing Classes:
GenericContextSCTest, GenericEventSCTest, GenericMachineSCTest
public interface IGenericSCTest<E extends IRodinElement,SCE extends IRodinElement> extends IGenericElementTest<E>
